caption: A man with glasses and a unique, tall, grey textured hairstyle is speaking into a microphone in a studio setting. He is wearing a white dress shirt, tan suspenders, and a bow tie, with large black headphones over his ears. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and some clothing displays. To the left of the man is a professional microphone with a pop filter, and to the right, there is a digital screen displaying the text "GOSS TALK JOY" along with "PODCAST" and smaller text below it. A similar logo featuring "GOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST" appears on the left side of the screen. Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in a similar position, speaking and slightly shifting his facial expressions and head posture as he talks.
